hero.name: Gustavo Dropa
hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.subtitle: Co-founder of FiqOn · Vue.js · TypeScript · Node.js

about.title: About me
about.text: Fullstack Developer with 4+ years of experience and co-founder of FiqOn, specialized in Vue.js, TypeScript and Node.js. Experienced in leading product teams, improving usability and implementing scalable microservices. Proficient in agile methodologies and project management, with a continuous focus on performance, accessibility and user experience.

roles.title: Mid-level Front-End Developer
bullets: Development of Micro Frontend services in Vue (versions 2 and 3).
Maintenance and new features for legacy systems in CSHTML, JQuery, Knockout and Vanilla JS.
Recurring contact with the product team for assertive Enterprise demand alignment.
Scrum methodology with weekly demos and daily standups.

roles.title: Mid-level Front-End Dev · Co-Founder
bullets: SPA development in Vue 3 with TypeScript, SASS and Vuetify.
REST API consumption, WebSocket events and state management with Pinia.
Backend development with Laravel and Go, using RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, MySQL, MongoDB, Docker and GCP.
Participation in technical validations and deadline/goal definition.

roles.title: Head of Product
bullets: Planned platform refactoring focused on usability and PLG strategy.
Competitor research and requirements gathering with American companies (advanced English).
Collaborated with international teams to identify market trends.
40% increase in development speed by adjusting agile methodology.

roles.title: Front-End Developer
bullets: Co-Founder: planned and developed the initial frontend structure of the integration platform.
Development in Vue 2 and JavaScript with Bootstrap and SASS.
Part of the founding team that received R$3 million from an angel investor.

roles.title: Fullstack Developer
bullets: Fullstack development with PHP (Codeigniter) and JavaScript/HTML/CSS.
MySQL and MongoDB database design with Sequelize in Node.js.
Created a time-tracking module for Continental AG, eliminating manual processes.

items.name: Conta Ponto
items.description: App that receives timecard photos and generates monthly work-hours reports using OCR and AI (Claude + Gemini).

items.name: Agenda Barber
items.description: Barber scheduling system with validated forms, date selection, and dark/light theme support.

items.name: Olfactory Quiz
items.description: Interactive fragrance signature quiz to help undecided users find the right perfume. Animated with Framer Motion.

items.institution: UTFPR — Federal Technological University of Paraná
Written and spoken · Experience with American companies

items.degree: Scientific Research — CUDA & Cellular Automata on GPUs
